raw_text: Phase 31：前端补齐 Project / Issue Graph / Recovery / Release 操作闭环。目标是在 moyuan-code 控制台中补齐项目接入、Issue Graph、恢复队列、Release 与部署操作的前端闭环，让中文用户能在当前项目上下文中完成录入、预览、审批、执行、查看 receipt 和错误恢复。需要覆盖前端页面、弹窗表单、状态文案、后端 API 对接、交互验证和截图检查。
clarified_requirement: Based on current project context, the requirement goal is: Phase 31：前端补齐 Project / Issue Graph / Recovery / Release 操作闭环。目标是在 moyuan-code 控制台中补齐项目接入、Issue Graph、恢复队列、Release 与部署操作的前端闭环，让中文用户能在当前项目上下文中完成录入、预览、审批、执行、查看 receipt 和错误恢复。需要覆盖前端页面、弹窗表单、状态文案、后端 API 对接、交互验证和截图检查。
acceptance_criteria: Implementation must satisfy the original user goal.
New or changed behavior must have automated tests or clear manual verification steps.
API responses, error handling, and status codes must be verifiable.
Critical UI flows must be verifiable through interaction checks or screenshots.
test_plan: Run the test commands identified for the project.
Run regression tests for the changed scope.
Add or run API unit tests and API smoke checks.
Add or run UI interaction checks and screenshots.
